name: City of Ten Thousand Buddhas
description: The City of Ten Thousand Buddhas is a large Buddhist community and monastery in Talmage, California, near Ukiah. Founded in 1976 by Master Hsuan Hua, it encompasses 488 acres and includes a monastery, university (Dharma Realm Buddhist University), elementary and high schools, and community facilities. It is one of the first Chinese Chan Buddhist monasteries established in the United States.
